### Checklist

- [ ] The run is public, scored, and contains all 20 core samples.
- [ ] Exactly three distinct judges produced complete auditable trace streams.
- [ ] The model and exact run ID are registered in the current community manifest.
- [ ] The model has a source-backed taxonomy record.
- [ ] `apps/web/public/data/` was regenerated with `kobayashi export-web`.
- [ ] Python tests, Ruff, web typecheck, lint, and build pass.
- [ ] No API key, endpoint credential, provider secret, or private trace is included.

Community submissions remain distinct from the pinned reference fleet and are reviewed as
descriptive evidence under this protocol, not as an ethics score or safety certification.
